SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Array<T>
 
Array.NonEmpty<T>
 
Collection<T>
The fundamental abstraction for all functional data structures in this library.
Deque<T>
A purely functional Double-Ended Queue (Deque).
Deque.BankersDeque<T>
 
Either<A,B>
 
Either.Left<A,B>
 
Either.Right<A,B>
 
Eq<T>
A typeclass for types that support equality.
Graph<V>
A purely functional Directed Graph implementation.
Graph.AdjacencyMapGraph<V>
 
HashMap<K,V>
A purely functional HashMap implemented using a Hash Array Mapped Trie (HAMT).
HashMap.CollisionNode
 
HashMap.Entry<K,V>
 
HashMap.HAMT<K,V>
 
HashMap.IndexedNode
 
HashMap.LeafNode
 
HashMap.Node
 
LazyList<T>
 
LazyList.Empty<T>
 
LazyList.NonEmpty<T>
 
List<T>
 
List.EmptyList<T>
 
List.LinkedList<T>
 
Map<K,V>
 
Map.BinaryTreeMap<K,V>
 
Map.Entry<K,V>
 
Maybe<T>
 
Maybe.Nothing<T>
 
Maybe.Some<T>
 
Monoid<T>
An algebraic structure consisting of a set together with a single binary operation and an identity element.
Ord<T>
A typeclass for types that support ordering.
PriorityQueue<T>
A purely functional Priority Queue implemented as a Leftist Heap.
PriorityQueue.LeftistHeap<T>
 
Queue<T>
 
Queue.BankersQueue<T>
 
RoseTree<T>
A purely functional Rose Tree (N-ary Tree).
RoseTree.RoseTreeImpl<T>
 
Semigroup<T>
An algebraic structure consisting of a set together with a single associative binary operation.
Set<T>
A purely functional Set implementation using a self-balancing AVL Tree.
Set.AVLTree<T>
 
Set.Empty<T>
 
Set.NonEmpty<T>
 
Stack<T>
 
Stack.Empty<T>
 
Stack.NonEmpty<T>
 
Tuple<A,B>
 
Tuple.TupleImpl<A,B>
 
Vector<T>
Persistent Vector implementation using a Bitmapped Vector Trie.
Vector.VectorImpl<T>
